name: procurement teams in mid-sized companies processing 10-20 invoices/month tool
description: For procurement teams in mid-sized companies processing 10-20 invoices/month, manual tracking causes late orders and supplier penalties. We automate the extraction of payment terms and compliance reporting instead of manual tracking.
target_audience: procurement teams in mid-sized companies processing 10-20 invoices/month
problem_solved: Ensuring compliance with supplier payment terms
features: manual entry of supplier payment terms

locked_fields.primary_user: procurement teams in mid-sized companies processing 10-20 invoices/month
locked_fields.primary_problem: Ensuring compliance with supplier payment terms
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For procurement teams in mid-sized companies processing 10-20 invoices/month, manual tracking causes late orders and supplier penalties. We automate the extraction of payment terms and compliance reporting instead of manual tracking.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual tracking of payment terms and compliance status
must_have_features: manual entry of supplier payment terms

one_liner: For procurement teams in mid-sized companies processing 10-20 invoices/month, manual tracking causes late orders and supplier penalties. We automate the extraction of payment terms and compliance reporting instead of manual tracking.
